answer: Place firm mangoes inside a dry brown paper bag at room temperature for 2-3 days to reach perfect sweetness. Do not refrigerate until fully ripe!
We harvest and ship daily. Standard delivery takes 1-2 days within Maharashtra (Mumbai, Thane, Chiplun) and 3-4 days nationwide.
If your fruit arrives damaged, snap a photo and file an immediate claim on our Feedback page within 24 hours for a hassle-free replacement or refund.
